{{Quote|Women with revolutions! That's what it is, boy! Stay clear of them and you'll live a whole lot longer!|Darren T. Weeb|<ref name="ML" />}}
'''Darren T. Weeb''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Arcadia (starship)|''Arcadia'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Weeb was a self-educated man. He had made smuggling his business since c. [[35 BBY/Legends|35 BBY]], and past run-ins with the law had almost ended with him on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. He often worked with [[Jenna Lars]], and he was known to be very protective of his associate. Weeb had his own private score against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and was not averse to aiding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in their struggle, provided it did not put Jenna at risk. He was known to present the façade of a simpleton, and to be suspicious of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-users]].
